programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Til Death Do Us Part: Mystery thriller with Candace Cameron Bure. When her dad is named as a murder suspect just before her wedding, can supersleuth Aurora solve the crime? (2021)

Thriller starring Emily Rose. While Annie is behind the wheel of her boyfriend's car, police discover a bloody knife in it. Now she needs to find out the truth before she's accused of murder... (2018)
Thriller starring Kellie Martin. A widow discovers her husband faked his death - and had another wife. Now, both women team up to uncover the truth about their heinous hubby's betrayal. (2006)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Game of Cat and Mouse: Crime drama with Candace Cameron Bure. When a mysterious criminal taunts Aurora by leaving clues at crime scenes, she must win the final round before it's too late! (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Game of Cat and Mouse: Crime drama with Candace Cameron Bure. When a mysterious criminal taunts Aurora by leaving clues at crime scenes, she must win the final round before it's too late! (2019)
Iris Doesn't Live Here Anymore: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
At Close Range: When shots ring out at a charity event Ryan suddenly finds himself in the middle of an assassination plot.
...Healthy Place To Die: Crime movie spin-off of the popular TV series. A culinary genius becomes embroiled in a murder mystery at a luxury spa resort. Starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Healthy Place To Die: Crime movie spin-off of the popular TV series. A culinary genius becomes embroiled in a murder mystery at a luxury spa resort. Starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. (2015)
Murder in the Air: Dr Sloan and Amanda find themselves investigating the murder of an airline pilot, killed mid-flight enroute to Zurich.
The Merry Widow Murder: Dr Sloan investigates the suspicious death of a wealthy man who is thought to have died from a medical condition.
A Quaking In Aspen: Jessica investigates the suspicious death of her friend's husband during a trip to Aspen, Colorado. Can she and Charlie Garret unearth the truth?
The Secret Of Gila Junction: Jessica helps an inexperienced sheriff investigate a major crime spree in a small town in Arizona.
Missing: As a missing waitress draws Jack and his team into a software piracy ring, Sue tries to help a thief whose only motivation is to raise money for his son's emergency surgery.
Habeas Corpse: When a charismatic personal-injury attorney is found dead, Beckett and Castle must dig through a long list of his clients and competitors.
Brotherhood: Carrie finds herself in danger while investigating the suspicious death of a college student.
Don of the Dead: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Stage Death: When a play about murder becomes a crime scene on opening night, can super-sleuth photographer Allie Adams capture the culprit? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Stage Death: When a play about murder becomes a crime scene on opening night, can super-sleuth photographer Allie Adams capture the culprit? (2020)
...Honeymoon, Honeymurder: Murder mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Newly-married Aurora and Nick's lakeside getaway takes a decidedly unromantic turn when they discover a body in the water. (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Honeymoon, Honeymurder: Murder mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Newly-married Aurora and Nick's lakeside getaway takes a decidedly unromantic turn when they discover a body in the water. (2021)
Thriller with Revell Carpenter. When nanny Kimberly uncovers her employer's affair with a lady who later turns up dead, she dives into the couple's dark secrets, fearing she might be next. (2021)
A single mother hires a male nanny to help with her two young sons, never suspecting that he may have more sinister intentions on his mind. Stars Ashley Scott, Mitch Ryan and Woody Jeffreys. (2017)

Habeas Corpse: When a charismatic personal-injury attorney is found dead, Beckett and Castle must dig through a long list of his clients and competitors.
Ships In The Night: When a gallery robbery leads to murder, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson and his old flame Dr Zee Madeiras catch a killer with an eye for the perfect crime? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Ships In The Night: When a gallery robbery leads to murder, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson and his old flame Dr Zee Madeiras catch a killer with an eye for the perfect crime? (2020)
Comedy Is Murder: Dr Sloan and the team investigate the murder of a legendary comedian's wife. But was she really the killer's intended target?
The Murder of Mark Sloan: The staff at Community General Hospital are grief stricken when a bomb blows-up Dr Sloan's car, seemingly killing him.
Big Easy Murder: Jessica investigates a series of murders during a research trip to New Orleans.
Home Care: Jessica's return to Cabot Cove is marred by a personal tragedy.
Prodigal Father: An inmate offers to help the FBI catch one of their most wanted criminals on the condition that he works with his son, agent Bobby Manning.
Sleeper: Castle searches for what happened to him during the two-months he was missing by piecing together snapshots from his recurring dreams. His search for the truth has consequences.
Carrie's Caller: Carrie receives a series of anonymous phone calls from a suspected serial killer who is taunting the police by informing them about their next murder.
Good Cop, Dead Cop: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...Witness: Mystery drama starring Taylor Cole. When a reporter uncovers a murder at her sister's wedding venue, she finds herself with an unexpected knack for crime solving (2019).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Witness: Mystery drama starring Taylor Cole. When a reporter uncovers a murder at her sister's wedding venue, she finds herself with an unexpected knack for crime solving (2019).
...Haunted By Murder: Spooky mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Aida plans to flip a house where a teenage Aurora once discovered a body. The death was deemed accidental - but was it really? (2022)
